title: lemeltonia cornuta
intro: Lemeltonia cornuta, also known as Yellow Bird's Eye, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, characterized by its vibrant yellow flowers and small, rounded leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Lemeltonia cornuta include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
